remaining_tasks.name: End-to-end webhook test with live GitHub PR

blockers.description: smee.io proxy not forwarding webhooks to localhost — events arrive at smee but don't reach server
blockers.workaround: Restart smee proxy and push new commit to trigger fresh webhook

blockers.description: voyageai npm package has broken ESM import (.jsx reference) — fixed with lazy dynamic import
blockers.workaround: Applied lazy getVoyageClient() pattern in embeddings/client.ts

blockers.description: DB tables needed manual creation — drizzle-kit push fails because sqlite-vec vec0 module not loaded
blockers.workaround: Created tables via raw SQL script. Need to add a db:init script.
